title: LA SFR — Type V-B, R-3 STANDARD stair with geometry outside the CRC limits (hard fail)
notes: Hard-fail twin of la-sfr-v5b-stair-geometry-violation. Same sub-limit CRC geometry — tread 9 in (< 10 in, CRC R318.5), riser 8 in (> 7-3/4 in), guard 36 in (< 42 in, CRC R312.1.2), handrail 40 in (> 34-38 in, CRC R311.7.8.1) — but the plan declares 'Stair type: standard'. That closes the spiral/winder exception (hard_when met), so all four CRC geometry twins assert a hard violation instead of needs_review. plan_type residential gates the IBC commercial twins (EGR-*) off (info, no double-fire). stair_type is declared ONLY in plan_text, exercising the run_eval _TEXT_FIELDS mirror.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1234 CANYON DR, LOS ANGELES CA 90049
CODE ANALYSIS SHEET A-0.1
2023 LA BUILDING CODE (LABC)
Occupancy Group: R-3 (single-family dwelling)
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 24 ft
Total building area: 2,800 sf
Per-story area: 1,400 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13D residential)
Design occupant load: 10
IECC compliance path: Title 24 Part 6 prescriptive
Electrical service: 200 A service main breaker
Water closets: WC 3
Lavatories: LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front door)
EXIT 2 (rear door)
EXIT DOOR 36" min clear width
Stair type: standard. Tread depth: 9 in. Max riser: 8 in. Guard height: 36 in. Handrail height: 40 in.
Fire alarm: NFPA 72 smoke alarms per CRC R314.

ground_truth.rationale: Table 506.2 R-3 = UL; no IBC area limit applies to a dwelling
Tread depth is 9 in, below the 10 in CRC R318.5 minimum. Declared stair type 'standard' closes the spiral/winder exception, so the 10 in minimum binds (hard fail).
Riser height is 8 in, over the 7-3/4 in CRC R318.5 maximum (max_dimension_check at the fractional limit). 'Standard' stair closes the exception (hard fail).
Guard height is 36 in, below the 42 in CRC R312.1.2 minimum. 'Standard' stair closes the stair-side-handrail-guard exception (hard fail).
Handrail height is 40 in, above the 34-38 in CRC R311.7.8.1 range (HIGH side of check_range). 'Standard' stair closes the handrail-type exception (hard fail).
The IBC commercial tread rule is gated off for a residential plan type — the CRC twin scores this dimension, so the IBC rule is not-applicable (no double-fire).
IBC commercial riser rule gated off for residential — CRC twin scores it; not-applicable.
IBC commercial guard rule gated off for residential — CRC twin scores it; not-applicable.
IBC commercial handrail rule gated off for residential — CRC twin scores it; not-applicable.
